title: Lokalisierte RepoBrief-Bundles sicher aufräumen
goal: Define and implement evidence-bound retention and garbage collection for immutable consumer-local RepoBrief bundles without deleting any generation that is referenced, leased, under publication, required for rollback or not yet proven unreachable.

acceptance.assertion: Reachability roots, rollback windows, leases, in-progress publication markers and minimum retention are explicit and versioned.
The collector defaults to a deterministic dry run that reports candidates, reasons, byte totals and proof inputs before any deletion.
Deletion requires a fresh reachability recheck and refuses referenced, leased, recent, malformed, unexpected or concurrently changing trees.
Interrupted collection is idempotent, auditable and cannot remove the currently authoritative or rollback-required generation.
Property-style reachability tests, race tests, dry-run dogfood, the complete Lenskit suite and GitHub CI pass on the exact implementation head.
The result does not claim optimal storage use, deletion on untrusted network filesystems, recovery without retained generations or automatic policy choice.

post_merge_github_diff_readback.note: Fresh gh pr diff rendering after merge; the pre-merge reviewed artifact remains the review binding.

validation: 31 focused retention tests passed on the reviewed implementation head.
The complete local Lenskit suite passed: 4040 passed, 1 skipped.
Ruff, graph/complexity ratchets and git diff --check passed.
All GitHub checks passed, including pytest-full, browser-tests, Ruff, release candidate, contracts and CodeQL.
Post-merge commit readback confirmed first parent ff7a48607547aa23020b04e8af0d1b7a58b8cb66 and reviewed head parent 697fb6d8f3624a615da022d90402d59a0768289a.
metadata.completion_summary: The merged collector safely removed exactly two unreachable legacy cabinet-main generations, terminalized both journals, left no quarantine residue, proved zero remaining candidates, installed the canonical hourly changed-only timer and completed a 40-repository production run with three real publications, 37 skips and zero failures.

verified_acceptance.rbv1-t026-reachability-contract: Versioned retention roots cover current pointers, stable manifests, explicit protections, active publication markers and a minimum of three retained generations.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t026-dry-run: The deterministic default dry run reported 80 protected paths, zero active publications and exactly two legacy candidates totalling 10,101,936 bytes before effect.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t026-safe-delete: The apply path rechecked identity and reachability, moved candidates through journal-bound quarantine, removed only the two reviewed cabinet-main generations and refused unsafe or changing trees.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t026-recovery: Both transaction journals reached terminal deleted state, stored tree hashes were retained, no quarantine path remained and the post-apply dry run found zero candidates.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t026-validation: 31 focused tests, the full 4040-pass Lenskit suite, Ruff and complexity checks, GitHub CI, merge-parent readback, production apply and live fleet readback all passed.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t026-nonclaims: No optimal storage use, untrusted network-filesystem safety, recovery without retained generations or automatic future policy choice is claimed.
